title: VPN connection drops hourly
summary: User reports VPN disconnects every hour on macOS.
internal_notes: Check split-tunnel policy for corp-laptop group.

title: Password reset loop
summary: Self-service password reset sends expired link immediately.
internal_notes: SSO clock skew suspected; verify IdP token TTL.

title: Production database latency spike
summary: Checkout API p95 latency exceeded 2s for 10 minutes.
internal_notes: Pager triggered; check connection pool saturation.
